programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The staged suicide of a petty officer turns out to be murder; the team secretly works on an online dating profile for Pride.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A Mardi Gras celebration at Pride's bar is cut short when he and Mayor Douglas Hamilton (Steven Weber) are abducted by unknown assailants.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Evidence suggests that the man responsible for saving a lieutenant's life is a soldier who was captured in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank locks horns with a data-tracking company when it refuses to unlock a terrorist's phone that may hold information regarding upcoming targets; Erin obtains information about an impending murder from a shady source; a woman kidnaps a baby.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a series of drive-by murders occurs after six wrongly convicted men are released from prison, Danny and Baez wonder if the murders were orchestrated by the men as an act of revenge; Frank combats feelings of guilt.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny takes a case involving a drug cartel member who he believes torched his house; Erin is given a promotion but finds herself in a challenging situation when both Danny and Jamie ask her for help with their investigations.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Gormley tries to locate a former NYPD detective he believes may be a threat to Frank's safety; Erin navigates office politics when she chooses to reopen a closed case; Jamie is transferred to a new precinct with a lot of problems.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny investigates a case involving a woman who shot her husband while she was drunk; Anthony defies Erin's orders to drop an assault case; Frank holds an emergency drill for his inner circle.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When New York City experiences a major blackout, police officers scramble to contain the resulting chaos; Frank uncovers some unpleasant truths about his department; Jamie and Eddie question the line between work and their relationship.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez investigate a murder attempt against a celebrated fertility doctor with a seemingly pristine reputation; Eddie must intervene in a Reagan family matter involving Danny's boys; Erin helps Anthony find justice after a date goes wrong.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Jamie clashes with Eddie and her new partner when they fail to intervene in a dispute at a convenience store; Danny and Baez investigate the death of a college freshman at a fraternity party; a sergeant accuses the department of reverse racism.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Things get personal for Danny when the drug cartel hit man responsible for torching his house resurfaces; an attack on an officer in the line of duty directly impacts a member of Frank's team; Eddie reluctantly introduces Jamie to her mother.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin and Frank clash over new legislation from the district attorney's office that undermines Frank's policies; Erin is at odds with Governor Mendez over questionable sex-trafficking laws; Danny risks his badge to protect a friend from losing his.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a video surfaces of cops being harassed by a group of people at a housing complex, Frank orders a raid to round up anyone with an outstanding warrant, against Garrett's advice.

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists test their line skills in the barbershop, military veterans sit in for an American classic style Elimination Tattoo, and tattoo legend Richard Stell guest judges.

programme.desc: The artists face off in a three-round Flash Challenge, a canvas asks for a tattoo with a unique placement, and NBA star Matt Barnes joins as a guest judge.

programme.desc: Canvases get tattoos inside of their mouths in the Flash Challenge, the artists design horror-themed tattoos for their canvases, and a contestant faces a medical emergency.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Don McLean's American Pie
programme.desc: This series focuses on the albums that have influenced the course of music. This edition looks at Don McLean's album "American Pie", crowned by its titular overture and the song Vincent.

programme.title: Chuck Berry - The Original King Of Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: CHUCK BERRY' tells the story of the Granddaddy of Rock & Roll. In this highly- anticipated OFFICIAL and Fully-Authorized feature documentary, the absolute instigator of Rock and Roll, Chuck Berry is truly revealed.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Bob Marley and the Wailers's Catch a Fire
programme.desc: "Catch a Fire," The Wailers' and reggae's introduction to the world, turned Bob Marley into a mega-icon of enormous proportions.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Cream's Disraeli Gears
programme.desc: Cream was rock's first true supergroup, combining the extraordinary talents of Eric Clapton, Ginger Baker and Jack Bruce in a power trio that set the template for hard rock during the 1970s.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Deep Purple's Machine Head
programme.desc: This classic album features the seminal song "Smoke on the Water," which brought worldwide superstardom to Deep Purple, putting them at the peak of hard rock.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Def Leppard's Hysteria
programme.desc: One of the most successful rock bands, Def Leppard was plagued by death and tragedy. The surviving members explain the making of their most successful album as they sort through the original tapes.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Duran Duran's Rio
programme.desc: A look at the behind-the-scenes creation of the iconic Duran Duran album "Rio," released in 1982.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Elton John's Goodbye Yellow Brick Road
programme.desc: This is the story behind one of the most popular double-albums of all time: Elton John's "Goodbye Yellow Brick Road," featuring Candle in the Wind, Bennie and the Jets and the title track.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Elvis Presley's Elvis Presley
programme.desc: This is the story behind Elvis's first album, which features performances from 1955 and 1956, interviews with the King and rare home movies of him at play and work.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Frank Zappa's Apostrophe/Over-Nite Sensation
programme.desc: This behind-the-scenes film tells the story of the recording of Frank Zappa's solo album "Apostrophe (') and the Mothers of Invention's "Over-Nite Sensation."

programme.title: Classic Albums: Judas Priest's British Steel
programme.desc: Judas Priest and producer Tom Allom discuss the writing and recording process behind this classic heavy metal album. Featuring concert video footage.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Motorhead's Ace of Spades
programme.desc: All the band members discuss life in the feisty and debauched world of Motorhead, and the band plays some of their legendary tracks specially for the documentary.

programme.title: Classic Albums Nirvana's Nevermind
programme.desc: This documentary looks at the story behind how Nirvana came to record the influential album "Nevermind" and gave birth to grunge music.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin steals a statue called the Stone Child from the Metropolitan Art Museum; he and Fujiko make their getaway in a Cessna, but they crash at the Bermuda Triangle. They encounter a ghost ship at this grave of many ships and planes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Foodie and gourmet aficionado Baron Gourmel says he wants to eat Lupin's brain. He claims he'd offer his own 70-million dollar jewelry collection to anyone who could capture Lupin. Fujiko hears of it and informs Lupin right away.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin III learns that his grandfather Arsène Lupin's secret treasures are buried in his grave. Lupin learns of its location with Fujiko's microfilm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are surrounded, as usual, as they are trying to escape after a jewelry theft. But somebody shoots at Zenigata and hits him dead on. Lupin learns of the even the next morning in the papers, and Fujiko and Goemon get implicated.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of the Duchy of Blanco has a one-of-a-kind gold coin of Hannibal hidden in his chest; well, Lupin and crew are after it. Amidst their scheming, Jigen is challenged to a duel with a man named Stoneman.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of France has run up a ridiculous tab with Maxim of Paris, and orders the Louvre Museum proprietor to sell a painting to cover his bill. But the proprietor doesn't want to let it go, and takes the painting out of the museum.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin recieves a letter about Marie Antoinette's jeweled crown, and sneaks into the palace of Versailles. A young man called Oscar appears, the sender of the letter.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin was told by Fujiko to steal a pistol of the Wilhem family worth 500 million pounds. Meanwhile, a man named Jim Benkei, a giant of a man who's stirred troubled in London, steals Jigen's favorite Magnum ...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the various jewels at the World Fair in Los Angeles. Lupin learns from Fujiko that a man named Harry Satler is also after the jewels, so he decides to go see who this guy is. The man he meets is a wizened old man…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Pestered by Fujiko, Lupin has to steal a golden bed that was originally made by Louis XIV for Josephine. He makes a plan with Jigen and Goemon, but the owner of the bed, Morgan, is a formidable opponent who has WWII military experience.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Heike Clan and Minamoto Clan once battled on Devil's Head Island at the inland sea of Seto; Fujiko and Lupin go there to find out about the details behind the legend of the battle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vivian dreams of becoming a star some day, but her auditions are a bust. She thinks of using Lupin to become famous; she makes Lupin engage in thievery, and informs reporters to be at the site to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Catherine rescues Lupin and Jigen, who are pursued by Zenigata as usual. She's an old acquaintance of Jigen's, and provokes Jigen to steal a 140-karat diamond from her own mansion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Wolf and Rose are a cool hitmen duo with the ambition of rising to the top of the hitman business by killing Lupin. They capture Goemon and torture him to confess about Lupin's weaknesses. Lupin learns that Goemon is in danger.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The chief of the police department accused of mismanagement on Lupin's release, hit the prime minister out of anger and was dismissed. Zenigata thinks that Lupin is the only arrest to avenge the chief's death, and starts an operation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The painting "The First Supper" hides clues to an heirloom that Christ received from Virgin Mary. This painting has been kept by the clan of Judah for generations, and a woman named Nova knows where the painting is hidden.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Mona Lisa never leaves the Louvre Museum. Arsène Lupin tried unsuccessfully to steal her and Lupin III wants her for his collection, however, and fireworks ignite between him and Zenigata in charge of security.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Lupin is after is the Golden Treasure Ship at Mount Horai. It's said that the Seven Lucky Gods conferred this treasure, which is shown in public only once a year when the New Year's bell rings at the belfry of Kohoji Temple.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Lupin is tossed to and fro by Fujiko. But a man named Buckingham comes to him and sells him "disguise chewing gum" for 50,000 dollars.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/23/1996 - The Yankees found themselves in a 6-0 hole against the Braves in Game 4 of the 1996 World Series. After a 3 run 6th inning, Jim Leyritz hit a three-run homer to tie the game in the 8th. New York would score two runs in the 10th for the win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 6/10/1997: Kevin Brown was nearly perfect on the mound against the Giants in the Marlins' second no-hitter in franchise history, walking Marvin Benard on a hit by pitch in the 8th inning of Florida's 9-0 victory.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 4/5/99: Raul Mondesi erupted at the plate, as he drove in six runs on four hits to help the Dodgers edge past the Diamondbacks in an 8-6 shootout.

programme.title: World Series Films
programme.desc: This World Series Film showcases the 1960 matchup between the Pirates and the Yankees. Entering the bottom of the 9th inning of Game 7 tied at 9, Pirates second baseman Bill Mazeroski smashed a walk-off home run to crown the team as World Series champions

programme.title: This Week in Baseball
programme.desc: 7/18/91: On this edition of This Week in Baseball, four pitchers from the Orioles blank the A's, Darryl Strawberry takes former teammate David Cone yard, and much more!

programme.title: Baseball Seasons
programme.desc: In 1979, Willie Stargell leads the Pittsburgh Pirates, spurned on by the motto "We Are Family". The Pirates meet the Orioles in the World Series.

programme.title: Cathedrals of the Game
programme.desc: Host Michelle Beadle visits the National Baseball Hall of Fame and Museum in Cooperstown, New York.

programme.title: Epic Moments
programme.desc: Thought to be unavailable to pitch in Game 5 of the 1999 ALDS against Cleveland because of an injury suffered earlier in the series, Pedro Martinez instead authored one of the single most inspiring performances in postseason history.

programme.title: World Series Films
programme.desc: This World Series Film showcases the 1965 matchup between the Dodgers and the Twins. With Los Angeles and Minnesota tied at 3 games apiece, Hall of Famer Sandy Koufax twirled a stellar three-hit shutout to lift the Dodgers to their 4th World Series. title

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Tony Gwynn entered the game against the Expos in Montreal needing just one more knock to collect the 3,000th hit of his career. He didn't waste much time, singling in the 1st inning to make history on his mother's birthday.

programme.title: Laserblast
programme.desc: A teenager discovers a laser weapon left behind by turtle-like aliens. He uses it for petty revenge, but the weapon slowly changes his personality.

programme.title: MST3K: Mad Monster
programme.desc: Things get hairy on the Satellite of Love thanks to the lupine antics of The Mad Monster (1942) and the second chapter of Radar Men from the Moon (1952).

programme.title: MST3K: Master Ninja I
programme.desc: The crew watch a ninja and a drifter save an airport from thugs in "Master Ninja I" while building a model muscle car and experimenting with their ninja skills.

programme.title: MST3K: Master Ninja II
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots endure two equally bad episodes from the failed action seriesThe Master(1984).

programme.title: Merlin's Shop of Mystical Wonders
programme.desc: A grandfather tells his grandson several horrifying stories involving the wizard Merlin and a stolen monkey doll in Merlin's Shop of Mystical Wonders (1996).

programme.title: MST3K: Operation Kid Brother (Operation Double 007)
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon (played by Neil Connery, brother of Sean), the brother of a secret agent, combats villain Thair Beta.

programme.title: MST3K: Parts: The Clonus Horror
programme.desc: Scientists run a clone farm for VIPs while Pearl and her goons are forced into babysitting omnipotent Space Children.

programme.title: MST3K: Project Moonbase
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch two more Commando Cody episodes and a film about a sabotaged space station. They also introduce their new product SPACOM to the Mads.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace ya dos años que Freddy mantiene una relación en línea, se contactaron por las redes sociales y a medida que se fueron conociendo, comenzó a florecer una relación de amor en línea.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace un año Diana conoció en una red social a Juan Manuel, sin embargo, nunca se han visto, ni han hablado por videollamadas. El día en el que se iban a conocer en persona, Juan Manuel tuvo un accidente de tránsito y perdió la vida.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: La luna de miel ya es un hecho para Dianey y Eduardo. Mientras se acostumbran con la idea, van despidiendose de la casa y de toda la experiencia inolvidable. Es la última noche. Los vientos del mar traen sus recuerdos cálidos y sus amores.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: El gran día ha llegado. Dos meses después de embarcar en una intensa experiencia, los 24 solteros podrán finalmente probar si lograron descubrir los 12 matches perfectos. Ganar el gran premio de 200 mil dólares es la meta!

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Ya hace un año que Jessica conoció al hombre de sus sueños por mensajes. Sin embargo no ha conocido a Emilio en persona, ni ha aceptado hacer video llamadas y eso la lleva a desconfiar de su identidad.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Karen entró en contacto con Álvaro por una red social, pero cuando él le propuso dar el siguiente paso en la relación ella se negó y Álvaro terminó borrándola de su red de amistades. Hoy día Karen necesita la ayuda de Diego y Sebastián.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace ya dos años que Freddy mantiene una relación en línea, se contactaron por las redes sociales y a medida que se fueron conociendo, comenzó a florecer una relación de amor en línea.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex en la villa, que no le cae muy bien a todos, pero parece que habrá una reconciliación. Norma está celosa por Sargento y Renata. En la fiesta de togas, Montse y Ernesto coquetean. Sargento se altera y casi llega a los golpes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el quinto ex a la villa y es una gran sorpresa para varios. Spencer se va de cita y cree encontrar el amor. Rocío muestra que su venganza va en serio y coquetea con Ernesto y Oscar. Una maldición parece romperse en la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a reconquistar a su antigua pareja. Renata y Sargento van en serio, mientras que Rocío y Alejandro resuelven sus problemas por un rato. Ernesto sigue tratando de conquistar a Montse.

programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Quién es responsable del bienestar del pequeño Noel? Todo el mundo puede negar las acusaciones, pero alguien sabe qué pasó, y Steve va a obtener explicaciones.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lainie y Justin tienen un bebé de 9 meses juntos. Justin lastima a Lainie porque cree que ella es infiel. ¿Pero cómo reaccionará Steve cuando se enfrente a Justin?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Buddy pasa sus días fumando y jugando a los videojuegos, en lugar de mantener a su familia. Su novia Holly trabaja para mantenerlos a todos, incluyendo a su hijo que tiene necesidades especiales, ¡pero está harta!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lanikka está harta de los abusos de su novio Malcom. Después, los celos de Tim han destrozado su familia, pero ahora está desesperado por recuperarlos, ¿Tiffany lo dejará definitivamente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jennifer se fue de casa para protegerse de su padrastro Allen. 15 años después, su madre quiere una segunda oportunidad, pero Jennifer tiene dudas. ¿Puede Steve ayudar a componer esta familia destruida?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Naomi, de 17 años, ha cambiado repentinamente de actitud y tiene la misión de ser madre. Sus padres, Leeanders y April, necesitan que Steve intervenga.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot advierte a Morgana acerca de Esteban, pero Morgana rechaza el consejo. Teresa le pide a Hilario que consiga un bebé para hacerlo pasar por el hijo que está esperando, pero Hilario se niega.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Verónica y Mariana hablan bajo la vigilancia de Doménica. Aun así puede contarle que está secuestrada y que no puede huir con Santiago. Arturo llega, la lleva a Doménica y la deja en manos de Lucho para que la cuide.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Fidela siente compasión por Rosaura al ver que tanto sufre por su hija perdida, pero el temor que siente por Sonia la obliga a callar la verdad.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva va a la hacienda Arismendi para descubrir ante Luis Mario que Marybella puede ver. Ella le pone una pistola en la cien a la modelo, pero ella no dice nada.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio le jura a Camelia que aun cuando se compruebe que él y Luis Mario son hermanos, jamás permitiría que se quede con Rosaura y tampoco se destruirá el odio que siente por él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano se queda sin palabras, esperando que el detective le diga quién es la madre que busca desde hace tanto tiempo. Jimena termina por convencer a Iván que debe casarse con Adriana.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Camila y Gerardo lamentan haber perdido a su pareja, que son Maximiliano y Marfil respectivamente. Previamente, Maximiliano le dice a sus amistades que Marfil no tiene problemas en darle hijos.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana entra a la cárcel y Gaviota le ofrece su ayuda. Cuando Gaviota sale en libertad, Diana la echa de menos.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Al ver a Maximiliano, Diana recuerda que él la vio cuando la apresaron, pero ella le miente diciéndole que tal vez se vieron en algún centro comercial.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana se abruma ante los halagos de Maximiliano. Diego los escucha y los interrumpe.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy le dice a Lissette que Luciano está arruinado, mientras que Margot y Morgana se enteran de la terrible noticia. Luciano le pide a Jeremías que siga el juego de que está en la ruina.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Santiago y Willy planifican ir a la policía para rescatar a Verónica. Mariana va en busca de Lissette para desahogarse con ella, de la tristeza que tiene al ver a Ricardo contra ella y su padre.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot advierte a Morgana acerca de Esteban, pero Morgana rechaza el consejo. Teresa le pide a Hilario que consiga un bebé para hacerlo pasar por el hijo que está esperando, pero Hilario se niega.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro's barely breathing, and Admiral Kizaru is ready to stomp him into oblivion. The battered and beaten Straw Hats could certainly use a powerful friend right about now.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One by one, the mighty paw-print of Bartholomew Kuma makes the Straw Hats disappear until only Luffy remains. To where did his mates vanish? And will he ever see them again?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yesterday, the Straw Hats valiantly battled a Warlord of the Sea. Today, Boss Luffy and his friends at the Pinwheel Diner prepare to compete in the Great Portable Shrine Race!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thriller Company sabotages the race for a sacred treasure, and the displaced Straw Hats must pull an all-nighter to rebuild their shrine and score some ancient gold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finds himself stranded and starving on a strange island. The rubber-man's amazing appetite puts his manhood in danger when he devours an array of exotic mushrooms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An army of scantily-clad women warriors want to investigate Luffy's family jewels, but the captain of the Straw Hats is more interested in reuniting with his lost mates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The women chasing Luffy are loyal subjects of Boa Hancock, the curvaceous Warlord of the Sea. This stone-cold beauty is deadly, and she's about to pick a fight with an entire fleet of marines!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's search for a seaworthy vessel leads to a "drop-in" on the Snake Princess during the royal bathing hour. The view is world-class, but it might turn the rubber-man to stone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock makes Luffy mad when she turns Margaret into a statue. The Snake Princess may have bitten off more than she can chew by challenging the captain of the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Snake Princess pits Luffy's Gum-Gum abilities against the incredible Haki power of her serpentine sisters in a fight to the death. Will Luffy survive long enough to save his statuesque friends?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks his attack mode into Second Gear to save a precious statue, and the snake sisters start to feel the Straw Hat heat. At the battle's climax, Luffy makes an impression on his opponents.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: News of Luffy's run-in with the Celestial Dragons impresses the Snake Princess, so she tells him the story of her tortured past. Will his honorable nature speed Luffy toward a reunion with his crew?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is mobbed by a hoard of pretty Kuja women eager to touch a real live man. Granny Nyon offers him a safe haven, but what she has to say might sink his plans for a Straw Hat reunion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock's illness threatens to sabotage Luffy's rescue mission. However, the Snake Princess just can't say "no" to the rubber-man, so a plan to save Ace is quickly hatched.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy races to save Ace, Nami tries to survive life on Sky Island, and Franky dances up a snowstorm before making the switch from cola to tea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper narrowly avoids being served for dinner in a land inhabited by giant birds, and Sanji's refined tastes land him a role as a leading lady on the island of girlish hearts.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico Robin finds herself trapped on the island of Tequila Wolf: a miserable land where children are forced to work as slaves. Elsewhere, Usopp tries to survive a run-in with a man-eating plant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is held against his will by the pink-haired princess of bad vibes, Brook gets mistaken for the king of darkness, and Luffy continues to eat his way toward a reunion with Fire-Fist Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Boa arrive at Impel Down, but only thirty-three hours remain until Ace's execution. To save him, the Snake Princess must find a way to hide Luffy during her full-body search!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Time is running out on Ace, so Luffy teams up with a scoundrel who's going to pieces trying to escape Impel Down. There's no love lost between the former foes, but they'd better work together if they want to survive.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must part ways with a priceless treasure map before Buggy the Clown agrees to lead him through the bloody tangle of Blade Trees and Spike Needle Grass that make up Impel Down's Crimson Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Buggy the Clown could end up as hippo food if they aren't careful in Impel Down's Wild Beast Hell. Of course, the rubber-man might find that a better fate than dealing with the prison's putrid warden!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stumble upon a most peculiar village when they hitch a ride on a fire-breathing beetle. The natives are petrified of pirates, but they welcome the Straw Hats with open arms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The citizens of Little East Blue throw in a feast in honor of the Straw Hats, but when the Amigo Pirates try to capture Boss the Beetle, Luffy and his crew will have to defend their new friends.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji prepare to do battle on behalf of Boss the Beetle, but Captain Largo of the Amigo Pirates counters with a deadly arsenal of nets to put the Straw Hat brawlers on lock down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks into Second Gear for his rematch with Largo, and Nami leads the islanders as they lay waste to the Amigo Pirates. Boss the Beetle may be safe for now, but someone sinister lurks behind the scenes.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to stay a step ahead of a prison patrol made up of hungry lions and poisonous scorpions! Meanwhile, Ace spends what could be his final hours swapping stories with a pirate who hates pirates.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby gives birth to a new form of evil and disguises herself to form a bond with Brandy. Kelly returns with a friend who is leading the search for The Prophesized One to defeat The Dark Ones, while Ash realizes evil is out to get his daughter.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby reveals herself to Ash as she tries to strengthen her bond with Brandy to defeat The Prophesized One. Meanwhile, Pablo and Dalton continue to spar, unsure of one another.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Brock warns Ash of an otherworldly hurricane brewing. Ash and Pablo make a discovery at the hardware store. Kelly and Brandy face a familiar foe.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Trouble from Hollow Earth insurgents leads to a reunion...and an unanticipated betrayal.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: In search of a legendary abnormal, Magnus and Will become trapped by a cave-in.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A final confrontation looms as the team races to prevent the unleashing of a doomsday weapon.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will Magnus's plan be the salvation of Abnormal-kind...or its doom?

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) tries to sabotage Sandoval (Von Flores) and Howlyn's (Alan Van Sprang) plans for mass-producing Atavus regeneration chambers.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: William Boone (Kevin Kilner) faces an enemy from the past when Sandoval (Von Flores) brings Zo'or (Anita La Selva) back to life as an Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Love is both blind and deadly for J Street (Melinda Deines), who finds herself attracted to a seductive Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) travels back through time in pursuit of a deadly female Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) and Street ( Melinda Deines) check into a spa for some rest and relaxation but find themselves in a life and death struggle with an Atavus.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew rescues a group of refugees, only to discover they have been subject to government experiments and are extremely unstable.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka's Uncle Sid runs for office in the New Commonwealth, but an assassination attempt causes the crew to act as his security.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: When the Andromeda is attacked by space pirates, they are rescued by a long-lost spaceship from Earth.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The mysterious shooting of a restaurateur with no solid suspects and no murder weapon leaves detectives in a lurch, but when financial motives come to light, an undercover operation and clever forensic investigation turn the case upside-down.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A military veteran is missing and a young student is murdered in what appears to be a crime of passion, but the discovery of a secret payout leads police on a wild chase.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Passions and obsessions turn toxic when a beautiful young law student is found murdered and left in a trash can, leaving police to decipher a web of boyfriends, exes and unrequited lovers.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The wife of a Marine, a pregnant dominatrix and a sex slave cross paths in a twisted tale of kidnapping, lies and murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mom does all she can to provide for her kids, including taking up with five sugar daddies to make ends meet, but when jealousy rears its ugly head, this mom winds up dead and her killer is not who you would expect.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: To keep their marriage fresh, a young couple turns to a life of sex games and sharing spouses, but when threesomes and foursomes lead to murder, investigators struggle to prove who killed this swinger.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A lover's quarrel and a quick cash scheme lead to the murder of a happy retiree; the Hollywood community is stunned when a body is found under its most famous landmark.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother becomes a murder victim while living a double life; a web of deception, sex and murder sends detectives on a multi-year hunt to figure out who could have murdered her.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A high-speed car chase ends with a 40-year-old newlywed shot dead in front of her husband and stepdaughter; is this a robbery gone wrong, a gang ordered hit, or something more sinister.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The quintessential girl next door is discovered brutally killed on Thanksgiving weekend; it would take investigators over a year to uncover the dark obsession that led to her murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A foursome, a stripper, and a biker, is just the beginning for investigators of this massage table homicide; everyone is shocked as a secret fetish for murder is revealed.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found shot and stabbed in her kitchen; multiple suspects emerge, but the true mastermind of this murder hits closer to home than anyone expected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What started as a perfect marriage evolves into a threesome; after one of the participants winds up dead, the killer turns out to be someone the investigators never suspected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a psychic and her adult daughter are found killed under bizarre circumstances, the list of suspects grows long as investigators discover that male escorts, blackmail, fraud and love spells all played a part in this chilling double murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A mom starts online dating to try and cope after an unexpected tragedy, but when she gets pulled into the underbelly of the BDSM world and then disappears, investigators spend over a year unraveling this dark mystery.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A loving grandmother from a traveling community is found brutally murdered, shocking all; investigators soon uncover a web of lies, identity theft and millions in insurance fraud that point to who killed this sweet old lady.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A Steiff pushmi-pullyu "Doctor Dolittle" figure, circa 1967; Pablo Picasso linocut, circa 1950; a pair of Italian-carved door panels, circa 1550.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1956 Elvis "Love Me Tender" standee; a 1958 Martin Luther King Jr. letter; Charles Schulz comic strip art circa 1960.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A Lord Byron cellarette and portrait, circa 1810; a Louis Vuitton steam trunk, circa 1915; Louis Comfort Tiffany necklace, circa 1905.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An unpublished Art Spiegelman book proposal circa 1974; headboard from the set of "The Godfather: Part II"; rare photographic baseball cards with a handwritten letter from the 1871-1872 Boston Red Stockings.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A Tiffany Studios mosaic inkwell circa 1905; a show run from the Beatles' first appearance on "The Ed Sullivan Show" along with an autographed photo of the band; Joseph Kleitsch oil painting circa 1925.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Tiffany presentation watch gifted to NYPD Lt. Giuseppe Petrosino by the Italian government; a 1943 Irving Berlin manuscript; rare 1903 American Beauty-backed tobacco baseball cards.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A spinning wheel given by Mahatma Gandhi; pin designed by pop artist Roy Lichtenstein; diamond and platinum Van Cleef & Arpels necklace.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A scrapbook of World War II photos; an 1875 "Pictorial St. Louis" atlas; an inherited jade ring with case.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1939 collection from the rescue operation of USS Squalus; a Torino lamp; two Tlingit Shamanic masks.

programme.desc: Winter arrives in full force, and the remaining survivors must deal with rapidly deteriorating conditions. The lack of protein pushes some to new levels of depletion, and the pull to see family is more than some can bear.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The remaining survivalists push themselves to their physical limits as fish becomes scarce. But one participant takes it too far, reaching the breaking point and risking organ failure.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The bladesmiths must make their signature blades out of only drill bits and a chunk of mild steel. After two rounds, the remaining two smiths must recreate a deadly Indonesian sword -- the Kelewang.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The bladesmiths are forced to make canister Damascus using nuts and bolts. Ultimately, two smiths move on to the final round where they must recreate a pair of deadly Indian Bagh Nakh weapons.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four smiths must forge the iconic KA-BAR military blade using only tiny cubes of W-1 steel. In the final round, the two remaining competitors must recreate the battle-tested Glaive Guisarme.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must forge a multipurpose weapon from old rescue tools. After narrowly escaping elimination, the remaining two smiths must recreate a unique utilitarian tool -- the Russian Pioneer sword.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S02E202) - The Girl’s smooth walk on the runway leads to some rough talking about the house and causes a fight.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S02E203) - Top model wannabes face their greatest fears as they undergo extraordinary makeovers and compete in an adventurous photo shoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S02E204) - Top model wannabes face the toughest criticisms.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team take down an inner-city meth lab, but it is Don's FBI instinct that leads to the arrest of a bystander who is discovered to have a greater scheme in the works.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don's old flame Robin Brooks returns to California to prosecute an incarcerated criminal, but when three witnesses involved in the case are murdered, Don and his team realize that the next victim may be Robin and must work to keep her safe.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing psychologist whose brother has a criminal past. Plus, Martin's relationship with Kim (recurring guest star VANESSA MARCIL) heats up.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: As the team searches for a missing high-end Russian matchmaker, the agents find they have no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team tries to locate the son of a billionaire who disappears after piloting a small plane that crashes in the woods. Recurring guest star VANESSA MARCIL appears as Kim Marcus.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing reporter who recently wrote an exposé about a corrupt politician. NICHOLLE TOM ("The Nanny") and ADAM KAUFMAN guest star.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team tries to locate a teenager who was last seen in an amateur video being psychologically tormented by an unseen abductor.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack searches for his daughter Hannah's (VANESSA MARANO) boyfriend after he runs away from home. Recurring guest star ADAM KAUFMAN appears as Brian Donovan.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a man who disappears after a late-night dive, and Danny and Elena take their relationship to another level. MARTIN LANDAU and ADAM KAUFMAN guest star.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his team investigate the case of a 28-year-old marketing executive, Maggie Cartwright, who seems to have simply walked away from her life, leaving everything behind.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his team search for an 11-year-old boy, Gabe (DAVID HENRIE), who disappears from a subway station en route to Yankee Stadium for what was to be his birthday celebration.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Duncan Muller realizes that he needs to go back into a store to retrieve his credit card. After he walks away, his wife's car speeds off, leaving a bystander injured.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The agents must find a woman, Eve, who changes her appearance to suit whatever modeling or acting job she is seeking. No one seems to know Eve well, including her roommate.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his squad search for 17-year-old Andy Deaver, who was last seen by the charismatic headmaster of Spalding Academy, the private boarding school Andy attends.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: Jamesy Boy
programme.desc: Rage-filled teenager James is never one to back down from a fight. He jumps at the chance to run drugs and guns for a gang and quickly ends up behind bars.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Supernova
programme.desc: "Supernova" chronicles the search and rescue patrol of a deep space medical ship and its six-member crew.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: Mimic 2
programme.desc: Four years after a terrifying mutation took New York City by surprise, a detective stumbles upon a link between the "mimic" creatures and three grisly new murder victims. The shape-shifting bugs are back.

programme.title: From Beyond
programme.desc: A doctor stimulates a sensory gland in the brain. This allows him to see into "The Beyond". When he sees the inhabitants of this realm they can see him too. They are eager to introduce him to their world and the doctor gets more than he bargained for

programme.title: Ghoulies
programme.desc: When a college student inherits an old mansion he finds he has also inherited its residents--a bunch of slimy, hairy, fanged creatures who'll do anything for him, even kill.

programme.title: Cutthroat Island
programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.title: Night of the Comet
programme.desc: A huge comet passes near the earth, vaporizing nearly the whole planet. But a few partially exposed people are now blood-thirsty zombies, and they begin a hunt for the remaining humans.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: August: Osage County
programme.desc: Meryl Streep and Julia Roberts lead an all-star cast. A family crisis unites a dispersed group of siblings at the Oklahoma house they grew up in with the dysfunctional woman who raised them.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: OSCAR-winning Meryl Streep is Margaret Thatcher in this insightful and intimate portrait of the first and only female Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. "This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Krisha
programme.desc: Tensions rise at a Thanksgiving gathering when Krisha shows up at her sister's Texas home and reunites with the extended family that she abandoned years earlier in an emotionally charged familial reckoning.

programme.title: The Sea of Trees
programme.desc: After traveling to Japan's Aokigahara Forest, a troubled teacher (Matthew McConaughey) meets a mysterious stranger (Ken Watanabe) who takes him on a life-changing journey of love, discovery, and redemption.

programme.title: The Prince of Tides
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand and Nick Nolte star in the stunning screen adaptation of Pat Conroy's best-selling novel, THE PRINCE OF TIDES. Nolte is Tom Wingo, a disillusioned Southern coach who must reveal his tortured childhood in order to help his suicidal sister.

programme.title: Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow
programme.desc: When mysterious giant robots begin attacking the streets of New York City, intrepid reporter Polly Perkins is on the story and enlists the aid of ace aviator and old flame Joseph 'Sky Captain' Sullivan.

programme.title: Love and Monsters
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: WarGames
programme.desc: The fate of mankind rests in the hands of a teenager (Matthew Broderick) who accidentally taps into the Defense Department's tactical computer. Dabney Coleman and Ally Sheedy co-star.

programme.title: Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow
programme.desc: When mysterious giant robots begin attacking the streets of New York City, intrepid reporter Polly Perkins is on the story and enlists the aid of ace aviator and old flame Joseph 'Sky Captain' Sullivan.

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Love and Monsters
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John Partridge joins John and Lisa in their kitchen to share his own food story.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: From Portsmouth, NH, chef Matt Louis cooks Goat Meatballs, while Ming counters with Surf-n-Turf Meatballs.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: It’s time for coconut with Carla Hall, co-host of The Chew! Carla makes Calaloo—a Crab and Coconut Spinach Soup—and Cassava in Coconut Sauce while Ming counters with a Creamless Watercress Soup with Honey Apple Salsa and Coconut Shrimp.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: The legendary Jacques Pépin and his granddaughter swing by Ming’s loft to make Curly Dogs with Pickle Relish, Mayogrette Dressing, and Potato Salad. Ming cooks up some quick Chinese Sausage Buns. Simple ingredients make delicious dishes!

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: One of the world’s most distinguished Latin chefs, Aarón Sánchez – judge on Chopped and Masterchef – visits Ming in his loft to cook his Albóndigas Tacos, while Ming makes Beef and Salted Watercress Scallion Pancakes.

programme.title: Project Fire: Raichlen's Rules
programme.desc: Learn Steven Raichlen's essential rules of grilling, from choosing the right fuel to mastering different grilling techniques.

programme.title: Project Fire: Grilling with Wood
programme.desc: Explore the unique flavors that different types of wood impart on grilled foods. Steven grills with oak, cherry, and mesquite.

programme.title: Project Fire: Brisket 24/7
programme.desc: Master the art of smoking brisket with recipes that take you from morning to night, including breakfast brisket tacos and smoked brisket chili.

programme.title: Project Fire: Gulf Coast Grill
programme.desc: Discover the flavors of the Gulf Coast with dishes like grilled oysters, Gulf shrimp, and blackened redfish.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: The boogeymen will have you on your best behaviour at this restaurant in Japan.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: Mexican restaurant where yesterday's trash is today's over-the-top décor—where we'll witness a wedding in a chapel made of pop bottles.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: A restaurant in Ukraine where if you've ever hungered to hunker in a bunker, then this underground, military-themed restaurant will have you signing up on the spot.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: Back to the middle ages for a medieval feast at 'La Taverne Des Oubliees' in Seine Et Marne, France.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Anthony's tip is to get far away from the hotel to try authentic food in Chiang Mai, Thailand

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: See how the natives in Vietnam use a river for business and lifestyle.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Instead of staying in the airport for the layover, Anthony heads out to enjoy Bangkok cuisine. Then he heads off to Little India in Singapore.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Anthony travels to Tokyo, where he begins in the Tsujiki market and then is introduced to techniques in preparing edaomae sushi. He also learns the diets of Sumo wrestlers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Rural Japan: Tony decides to look for a more relaxing, traditional Japanese culinary experience in the countryside. Tony travels to an old-style Japanese inn that specializes in kaiseki cuisine, ancient tea ceremony, and local ingredients.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam: After taking a cyclo ride through Ho Chi Minh City and trying various foods from roadside vendors and markets, Tony tests his might with a few shots of snake wine and a live cobra heart.

programme.title: You Gotta Eat Here

programme.desc: Host John Catucci discovers the ultimate Japanese comfort food at Toronto's Kinton Ramen.

programme.desc: Host John Catucci devours extreme grilled cheese at Cleveland's Melt Bar & Grilled.

programme.desc: Host John Catucci enjoys the East Coast hospitality – and the Yellowbellly Burger – in St. John's.

programme.desc: Host John Catucci is in Rome to discover three must-eat restaurants in the Eternal City.

programme.title: You Gotta Eat Here
programme.desc: Host John Catucci brings his fork to Florence where he tastes panini worth lining up all day for at busy All'Antico Vinaio.

programme.title: Celts: The Untold Story
programme.desc: A journey to some of the mysteries of how the early Celts emerged and expanded.

programme.title: Celts: The Untold Story
programme.desc: After thriving as traders for centuries, the Celts reinvented themselves as fearless warriors.

programme.title: Celts: The Untold Story
programme.desc: In the 2nd Century BC, Celtic tribes established prosperous cities dedicated to trade.

programme.title: Fire Mountain: The Eruption and Rebirth of Mount St. Helens
programme.desc: Two hundred and thirty square miles leveled in moments.

programme.title: Hannibal: The Father of Strategy
programme.desc: There have been few military leaders through the ages to have become truly memorable but one strategist stands out from the crowd in the 21st Century, even though he lived long, long ago, before the birth of Christ. The man in question is of course Han...

programme.title: The Khufu Pyramid Revealed
programme.desc: The Great Pyramids are the only wonders of the ancient world that still stand today, the greatest of which is the pyramid of Khufu. Many theories have been offered to explain its construction, but none as convincing or unique as this one.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt Top 7 Pyramids
programme.desc: Join this marvelous investigation as Egyptologists and architects reveal the ranking of seven of Ancient Egypt’s most impressive stone giants.

programme.title: Lost Treasures Of The Ancient World: Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: This program visits, explores and restores such wonders as the Temples at Al Karnak and Luxor, the Temple at Abu Simnel and more.

programme.title: The Mysteries Of Egypt: Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Featuring new location footage, filmed re-creations and expert analyses, this program tells the story of the Kingdom on Ancient Egypt.

programme.title: The Egyptians
programme.desc: The ancient Black Pyramid, dating back 1,800 years, appears ruinous yet harbors intricate underground tunnels. Egyptologist Lark Lenher delves into these passageways, revealing impressive artifacts.

programme.title: The Egyptians
programme.desc: We find extraordinary graphic representations on sarcophagi, papyrus scrolls, the walls of tombs and other buildings.

programme.title: The Egyptians
programme.desc: Two hundred years ago, Jean-François Champollion deciphered the Egyptian hieroglyphs for the first time, thus solving one of the greatest enigmas in the history of humanity.

programme.title: The Final Girls
programme.desc: A young woman grieving the loss of her mother, a famous scream queen from the 1980s, finds herself pulled into the world of her mom's most famous movie. Reunited, the women must fight off the film's maniacal killer.

programme.title: The Craft: Legacy
programme.desc: In Blumhouse's continuation of the cult hit The Craft, an eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

programme.title: Oculus
programme.desc: A woman tries to exonerate her brother, who was convicted of murder, by proving that the crime was committed by a supernatural phenomenon.

programme.title: The Ring
programme.desc: When four teenagers all meet with mysterious deaths exactly one week after watching a videotape, investigative reporter Rachel Keller tracks down the video... and watches it.

programme.title: The Ring Two
programme.desc: When evidence at a local crime scene reveals a mysterious unmarked videotape, Rachel realizes that Samara is back and more determined than ever to continue her relentless cycle of terror.

programme.title: Rings
programme.desc: When a college professor discovers the video rumored to kill viewers 7 days after watching, he and his students try to unlock the secrets of the Samara legend. But when the video goes viral, they must find a way to defeat Samara before it's too late.

programme.title: Eden Lake

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When thick fog interrupts our heroes' journey, a girl and her Ninetales invite them to rest at a nearby mansion...where Brock and their host fall into a romance that could turn out to be ghostly!

programme.desc: Near Mt. Mortar, our heroes run into a Trainer who is trying to curb a Tyrogue's wild ways. But when Team Rocket gets involved, will they be able to save the troublesome Tyrogue from the villains' clutches?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Reaching the Lake of Rage, Pikachu and Togepi begin to feel sick, and our heroes are attacked by an enraged red Gyarados. When Team Rocket appears on the scene, things look a lot more dangerous for Ash and friends…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Things look bad for our heroes, who have been captured by Team Rocket at the Lake of Rage. With the fate of the world's Pokémon at stake, can Ash rise to the occasion and save the day?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Finally reaching Mahogany Town, Ash is warming up for his next Gym battle. But after getting the cold shoulder from Gym Leader Pryce, can our hero convince his frosty opponent to give him a chance?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Pryce and Ash are about to clash in a cold contest in the Mahogany Town Gym. Will Ash be able to show what he and his Pokémon are made of and earn his seventh Johto region Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes encounter battling groups of Bellossom and Vileplume, who have only recently evolved. As each group fights with increasing number and intensity, can our heroes put an end to the quarrelling?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The heat is rising in our heroes' journey when Misty and her Water-type Pokémon go head to head with a willful Fire-type Trainer!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Ash and the gang bump into a Pokémon magician, and soon they're on the hunt to find components for her greatest spell yet!

programme.desc: Our heroes take time out to enjoy the entertainment of a young Trainer and her Igglybuff variety act. But it's not long before Team Rocket arrives and tries to steal the show!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
